title: Flagging stale decisions
question: Should the viewer flag decisions that may be stale and due for review?
rationale: Parked for now — identified as worth deciding, but not chosen. Leaning toward no signal until staleness is a felt need: age-based hints are noisy and a review-by date is overhead.

tradeoffs.note: derived from the date already stored; nothing new to capture
age isn't staleness; a 2-year-old decision can be perfectly current
precise and intentional — flags only what you marked
a new field to set on every decision; easy to forget
no nagging; rely on the human re-reading
the thing a review tool should help with goes unaided
